### Q: Can finance platforms automate R&D tax credit claims for startups?

Puzzle can automate most of the prep work for R&D tax credit claims, but not always the final filing. What these finance platforms can do:

That means startups can save hours on data work and get claim-ready records quickly, but you’ll usually still want a qualified tax professional to validate calculations and file the credit.

Lakshya Tiwari [...] ## Frequently asked questions about Finance

Real answers from real users, pulled straight from launch discussions, forums, and reviews.

### Q: How much do startup banking platforms typically cost versus traditional banks?

Mercury is commonly presented as a subscription-style startup bank — one commenter notes it’s about $240/year. For that price you often get bundled features startups value:

Compared with traditional banks, these platforms tend to package many business-focused tools into a single annual fee rather than charging per-service. That can be cheaper if you use several premium features, but compare the subscription cost to the fees you’d incur doing each service separately at a traditional bank.

I’m Shingo Irie, the creator of Lofi Desk. [...] Gabe Perez
Product Hunt

Product Hunt

Congrats on the launch, Shingo! I'm a sucker for this art style and LoFi tunes. I went to forward the link to my Phone and was pleasantly surprised to discover I could also use it on my Computer.  
  
Have it playing now! How did you curate the music/tunes? I feel like adding a bit more of the value add Lofi brings (or future roadmap) aside from the art and curation would help sell on the paid version!  
  
Really digging it so far :)

Shingo Irie
PocketCorder

PocketCorder

lijun xia [...] I’m Shingo Irie, the creator of Lofi Desk.

As a remote worker/developer, I often found myself struggling with two things: maintaining focus and feeling a bit lonely during long solo sessions. I tried regular playlists, but I missed the feeling of "presence."

That’s why I built Lofi Desk—to create the perfect deep work environment that feels alive.

What makes it special: 🎧 Dynamic Vibes: The room and the character's actions actually change based on the soundtrack (Cafe, Rain, Retro, etc.). 🍅 Focus Flow: Built-in customizable Pomodoro timer to keep your rhythm. 🤝 Companion: A friendly presence that works alongside you, so you're never truly alone.

I’d love to hear what you think! Which atmosphere is your favorite?

Thanks for your support! 🚀

Gabe Perez
Product Hunt

Product Hunt
